mnemonics: Many Computers Have Very Few Bugs
keyPoints: Node: A single element in a tree data structure
Root Node: The topmost node in the tree
Parent Node: A node that has children
Left Child: The node that is to the left of a node
Right Child: The node that is to the right of a node
Height: The number of edges from the root node to the leaf node
Balancing Factor: Used in self-balancing binary search trees
